# Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Modern web application with user authentication system featuring login and registration.

## Checklist

- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file
- [ ] Verify project requirements
- [ ] Scaffold the project
- [ ] Customize the project
- [ ] Install required extensions
- [ ] Compile the project
- [ ] Create and run task
- [ ] Launch the project
- [ ] Ensure documentation complete

## Project Details
- **Type**: Full-stack web application with authentication
- **Backend**: Node.js with Express
- **Frontend**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- **Database**: SQLite (or MongoDB alternative)
- **Features**: User registration, login, session management

## Development Instructions
Follow the checklist above to set up the project.
